widgets_values:
#### Models
- Get the vae and text encoder from [ComfyOrg](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/vae-text-encorder-for-flux-klein-9b/tree/main/split_files)

- Get the 9B distilled model from [Black Forest Labs](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-9B/resolve/main/flux-2-klein-9b.safetensors)

Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
└── 📂 models/
    ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
    │      └── flux-2-klein-9b.safetensors
    ├── 📂 text_encoders/
    │      └── qwen_3_8b.safetensors
    └── 📂 vae/
           └── flux2-vae.safetensors
```

#### Need Help?
Join the SuperComfy Discord and ask for help! [Invite Link](https://discord.gg/hq8qPbvznf)

nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values:
The reference head is seamlessly placed in the blacked out region.

Convert the image into a realistic, real-world style
Transform the image so it looks like a real photograph
Adjust the image to a photorealistic appearance
Render the image as a modern, high-resolution raw photo
Make the image appear lifelike and realistic
Recreate the image as if it were taken in real life
Change the image to a highly photorealistic style
Turn the image into a sharp, high-res RAW photograph
Convert the image into a natural, realistic look
Transform the image to resemble an actual photo
Apply a photo-realistic visual style
Render the image as a modern, high-definition RAW photo
Keep colors neutral and brightness subtle
Make the image look like a real-life photograph
Transform the image into a realistic photo scene
Change the image into a photorealistic version
Output the image as a clean, high-resolution RAW photo
Enhance the image to achieve a realistic appearance
Convert the image to look like it was captured by a camera
Shift the image toward a photorealistic style
Present the image as a modern, high-quality RAW photograph
Manually mask out the hair and head, make sure the neck area is somewhat untouched

nodes.title: Settings Guide
widgets_values:
sage_attention: auto or disabled
sampler: euler
sigma_max: 0.99 or 1.00
brightness (controls brightness of masked area): 1.00 or whatever you want
saturation (controls saturation of masked area): 1.00 or whatever you want
disable_mask_step: 2
